items.title: Base Building Run
items.description: Run 6 km at an easy pace of 6:30-7:00 min/km. Focus on maintaining a heart rate in Zone 2 (130-145 bpm).

items.title: Strength Training Session
items.description: Full-body strength training focusing on core and leg exercises. Include 3 sets of 10-12 reps for squats, lunges, and deadlifts, with 60 seconds rest between sets.

items.title: Interval Training
items.description: Warm up for 10 minutes, then perform 5x500m intervals at 5:00 min/km pace with 2 minutes of recovery jog between each interval. Cool down for 10 minutes.

items.title: Recovery Run
items.description: Run 4 km at a very easy pace of 7:30-8:00 min/km. Keep your heart rate below 130 bpm to aid recovery.
